title: Fenn (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|a common name|the [[Fenn system/Legends|Fenn system]] or [[Fen (disambiguation)]]}}
'''Fenn''' was a common name.

==First name==
[[File:FennRauArmor-SWCT.png|thumb|right|250px|Fenn Rau]]
*[[Fenn Booda]]
*[[Fenn Finau]], a [[bounty hunter]] who fought [[Cal Kestis]]

*[[Fenn Rizaar]]
*[[Fenn Shysa]]

==Last name==
*[[Clan Fenn]]
**[[Kh'aris Fenn]]
**[[Rh'ajah Fenn]]
**[[Ro Fenn]]
**[[Swilja Fenn]]
*[[Byra Fenn]]
*[[Fiav Fenn]]
*[[Rori Fenn]]
*[[Slerog Fenn]], operator of [[Fenn's Landing]]
*[[Tchaw Fenn]]

==No other name known==
*[[Fenn (spacer)|Fenn]], a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]
